Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I have detected a gaze upon us for an estimated seven minutes now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}Oh, sorry... I just wanted to watch. Was I bothering you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}I was just curious what it's like to study for an exam.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}Huh!? Are you... trying to get back at me? I'm sorry...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Um... Is it all right if I study with you? If it isn't too much trouble, I mean...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}My data states that elementary school does not feature regular examinations. Is this information inaccurate?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 0 25 25}No, you're right... We don't really have tests that we need study a whole week in advance for...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Sorry, um... If you're not okay with it, I can just...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Oh, thank you! I'll go get my workbooks now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}...Next question. What is the term used to describe the property of having zero electrical resistance?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 4 25 25}I-I just happened to see it on TV! It was an ultimate technique in Featherman... Not that I care about that stuff![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 1 25 25}Yeah, that's it! The Featherman technique! It's so cool— I mean, that's what I heard from a friend, anyway...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 2 3 25 25}Oh, sorry, Koromaru... I guess I was being a little loud. Let's get back to studying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all started taking our studies seriously...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I'm focusing better than usual...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}It appears that Amada-san has entered a state of non-REM sleep. He is in a deep slumber.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Sleeping here may cause his body temperature to decline sharply, risking illness. Shall we wake him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I wonder what kind of dreams Amada-san will have...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Let's transport him carefully to prevent waking. I will accompany you on the way to his room.[n]{f 1 1}
